segment.source: Day of the week #
segment.target: Day of the week #

segment.source: Authors: Abdel, Noelia.
segment.target: Authors: Abdel, Noelia.

segment.source: This add-on allows you to find a day of the week corresponding to a chosen date.
segment.target: This add-on allows you to find a day of the week corresponding to a chosen date.

segment.source: It adds a submenu in the NVDA Tools menu named "Day of the week", containing 2 items:
segment.target: It adds a submenu in the NVDA Tools menu named "Day of the week", containing 2 items:

segment.source: The first one named "Search a day", opens a dialog composed of 3 controls:
segment.target: The first one named "Search a day", opens a dialog composed of 3 controls:

segment.source: A listbox to choose or type your date;
segment.target: A listbox to choose or type your date;

segment.source: An "OK" button to display a messageBox containing your day;
segment.target: An "OK" button to display a messageBox containing your day;

segment.source: A "Cancel" button to close the dialog.
segment.target: A "Cancel" button to close the dialog.

segment.source: The second one named "dayOfTheWeek add-on settings" opens the parameters of the add-on to specify whether you want to report labels for date fields or not, it is composed of the following elements:
segment.target: The second one named "dayOfTheWeek add-on settings" opens the parameters of the add-on to specify whether you want to report labels for date fields or not, it is composed of the following elements:

segment.source: Enable accessibility of the date selector;
segment.target: Enable accessibility of the date selector;

segment.source: Level of the announces of labels, you will then have 3 choices:
segment.target: Level of the announces of labels, you will then have 3 choices:

segment.source: Long (it's the default choice);
segment.target: Long (it's the default choice);

segment.source: Short (for short announcements);
segment.target: Short (for short announcements);

segment.source: Off (to disable labels announcements).
segment.target: Off (to disable labels announcements).

segment.source: Enable announcement of the current date field value only, when moving vertically;
segment.target: Enable announcement of the current date field value only, when moving vertically;

segment.source: An "OK" button to save your configuration;
segment.target: An "OK" button to save your configuration;

segment.source: A "Cancel" button to cancel and close the dialog.
segment.target: A "Cancel" button to cancel and close the dialog.

segment.source: Notes ##
segment.target: Notes ##

segment.source: You can close these dialogs just by pressing Escape;
segment.target: You can close these dialogs just by pressing Escape;

segment.source: You can assign a shortcut to open these dialogs in "Input gestures" menu and, more precisely, in the "Day of the week" category;
segment.target: You can assign a shortcut to open these dialogs in "Input gestures" menu and, more precisely, in the "Day of the week" category;

segment.source: If you use NVDA 2018.2 or higher, you'll find only one item in the tool menu for searching your day, the add-on settings will be in the NVDA settings panel.
segment.target: If you use NVDA 2018.2 or higher, you'll find only one item in the tool menu for searching your day, the add-on settings will be in the NVDA settings panel.

segment.source: Compatibility ##
segment.target: Compatibility ##

segment.source: This add-on is compatible with the versions of NVDA ranging from 2019.3 and beyond.
segment.target: This add-on is compatible with the versions of NVDA ranging from 2019.3 and beyond.

segment.source: Changes for 20240326.0.0
segment.target: Changes for 20240326.0.0

segment.source: Updated compatibility for nvda-2024.1.;
segment.target: Updated compatibility for nvda-2024.1.;

segment.source: Deleted download link from readme, the download link for future updates will now only be available from the add-on store.
segment.target: Deleted download link from readme, the download link for future updates will now only be available from the add-on store.

segment.source: Changes for 20231229.0.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 20231229.0.0 ##

segment.source: Added a backward compatible implementation to support speak on demand mode, which will soon be available with nvda-2024.1.
segment.target: Added a backward compatible implementation to support speak on demand mode, which will soon be available with nvda-2024.1.

segment.source: Changes for 20231015.0.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 20231015.0.0 ##

segment.source: Fixed a bug detected when navigating with up arrow from the date picker in the latest versions of NVDA.
segment.target: Fixed a bug detected when navigating with up arrow from the date picker in the latest versions of NVDA.

segment.source: Changes for 20230728.0.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 20230728.0.0 ##

segment.source: Applied the flake8 and mypy rules to the code;
segment.target: Applied the flake8 and mypy rules to the code;

segment.source: Changed the minimum supported NVDA version to 2019.3 to support annotations introduced in Python 3.
segment.target: Changed the minimum supported NVDA version to 2019.3 to support annotations introduced in Python 3.

segment.source: Changes for 20230607.0.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 20230607.0.0 ##

segment.source: Added the following workflows:
segment.target: Added the following workflows:

segment.source: auto-update-translations - to automatically update translations from NVDA's translation system.
segment.target: auto-update-translations - to automatically update translations from NVDA's translation system.

segment.source: release-on-tag..yaml: to build and publish the addon as soon as a new tag is pushed;
segment.target: release-on-tag..yaml: to build and publish the addon as soon as a new tag is pushed;

segment.source: manual-release.yaml: to build and release new versions of the add-on manually.
segment.target: manual-release.yaml: to build and release new versions of the add-on manually.

segment.source: Updated translations.
segment.target: Updated translations.

segment.source: Changes for version 20230508.0.0 and beyond ##
segment.target: Changes for version 20230508.0.0 and beyond ##

segment.source: • Changed version number, minimum NVDA version and download link according to store conventions/requirements.
segment.target: • Changed version number, minimum NVDA version and download link according to store conventions/requirements.

segment.source: Changes for 19.02 ##
segment.target: Changes for 19.02 ##

segment.source: Changed version numbering using YY.MM (The year in 2 digits, followed by a dot, followed by the month in 2 digits);
segment.target: Changed version numbering using YY.MM (The year in 2 digits, followed by a dot, followed by the month in 2 digits);

segment.source: Added compatibility with the new versioning format of add-on, appeared since nvda 2019.1.
segment.target: Added compatibility with the new versioning format of add-on, appeared since nvda 2019.1.

segment.source: Changes for 6.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 6.0 ##

segment.source: added the addon settings to the NVDA settings panel for NVDA 2018.2 and higher;
segment.target: added the addon settings to the NVDA settings panel for NVDA 2018.2 and higher;

segment.source: Moved the item for searching a day to the tools menu;
segment.target: Moved the item for searching a day to the tools menu;

segment.source: Added the backward compatibility of the add-on with the NVDA versions that preceded 2018.2, which included the settings panel.
segment.target: Added the backward compatibility of the add-on with the NVDA versions that preceded 2018.2, which included the settings panel.

segment.source: Changes for 5.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 5.0 ##

segment.source: Added the compatibility of the add-on with wxPython 4.0 and Python3;
segment.target: Added the compatibility of the add-on with wxPython 4.0 and Python3;

segment.source: Fixed a bug with add-on paths that contain non-ASCII characters.
segment.target: Fixed a bug with add-on paths that contain non-ASCII characters.

segment.source: Changes for 4.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 4.0 ##

segment.source: The add-on is now able to recognize all the regional date formats that the user can choose;
segment.target: The add-on is now able to recognize all the regional date formats that the user can choose;

segment.source: Added the backward compatibility of the add-on with the NVDA versions that preceded 2016.4, which included the gui.guiHelper module.
segment.target: Added the backward compatibility of the add-on with the NVDA versions that preceded 2016.4, which included the gui.guiHelper module.

segment.source: Changes for 3.1 ##
segment.target: Changes for 3.1 ##

segment.source: Back to the previous format for the day of the week because it allows to recognize a greater number of languages;
segment.target: Back to the previous format for the day of the week because it allows to recognize a greater number of languages;

segment.source: Improved the accessibility of the date selector with recognition of the 3 fields 'Day', 'Month' and 'Year', and their respective values;
segment.target: Improved the accessibility of the date selector with recognition of the 3 fields 'Day', 'Month' and 'Year', and their respective values;

segment.source: Added a technique for the integration of the Georgian language for the recognition of the days of the week;
segment.target: Added a technique for the integration of the Georgian language for the recognition of the days of the week;

segment.source: Added a configuration dialog box to enable or disable the accessibility of the date selector;
segment.target: Added a configuration dialog box to enable or disable the accessibility of the date selector;

segment.source: Moved the add-on submenu from "Tools" to "Preferences";
segment.target: Moved the add-on submenu from "Tools" to "Preferences";

segment.source: Changed the add-on category to "Day of the week".
segment.target: Changed the add-on category to "Day of the week".

segment.source: Changes for 2.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 2.0 ##

segment.source: Used the gui.guiHelper module to ensure the correct appearance of the dialog asking for a date;
segment.target: Used the gui.guiHelper module to ensure the correct appearance of the dialog asking for a date;

segment.source: Added the GPL license to the addon;
segment.target: Added the GPL license to the addon;

segment.source: Days of the week have been translated, so that the add-on works properly in the different languages;
segment.target: Days of the week have been translated, so that the add-on works properly in the different languages;

segment.source: Changed the day format to avoid encoding errors.
segment.target: Changed the day format to avoid encoding errors.

segment.source: Changes for 1.0 ##
segment.target: Changes for 1.0 ##

segment.source: Initial version.
segment.target: Initial version.
